improvements: Added chunked OTA download pipeline for reliable firmware updates over SDIO.
Build pipeline now splits firmware into 128 KB chunks for incremental download.
Added OtaUpdater class with chunk-based download, NVS resume, and UI callbacks.
fixes: Changed compile debug level from none to error for better SDIO diagnostics.
notes: Firmware chunks are uploaded alongside the full binary in each GitHub Release.
OTA downloads now resume from the last completed chunk after a power cycle.
